headline: Volkswagen deal with EV maker Xpeng shows how China tech threatens Western automakers
summary: Xpeng's deal to make software, hardware and even vehicles with VW Group in China shows that Chinese firms are now making the high-value components.

headline: Baidu robotaxis reportedly halted mid-traffic causing crashes in Wuhan, China
summary: Baidu's Apollo Go robotaxis stopped mid-traffic in a Chinese city on Tuesday, leading to at least one highway collision, according to social media.

headline: A Look At Aptiv (APTV) Valuation After Modulus Connector Launch In Aerospace And Defense
summary: Aptiv (APTV) shares are in focus after the company teamed up with Winchester Interconnect to launch Modulus™, a modular connector platform aimed at Low Earth Orbit satellites and unmanned aerial systems. See our latest analysis for Aptiv. At a share price of US$69.44, Aptiv’s stock has a 1-day share price return of 4.2%. However, the 30-day and year-to-date share price returns of 5.6% and 11.5% declines suggest momentum has cooled, even as the 1-year total shareholder return of 17.4%...
